name: PanelSpriteContinuousBar

changelog.breaking: - Resource bars now use "variants", allowing easy swapping of their visual aspect. You will have to make some adjustments to existing resource bars in your project. Follow this [migration documentation](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/objects/custom-objects-prefab-template/migrate-to-variants/) to do these changes.

shortDescription: A bar that represents a resource in the game (health, mana, ammo, etc).

eventsBasedObjects.description: A bar that represents a resource in the game (health, mana, ammo, etc).
eventsBasedObjects.name: PanelSpriteContinuousBar

eventsFunctions.name: Value
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetValue
eventsFunctions.description: Change the value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxValue
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the maximum value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxValue
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: IsEmpty
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the bar is empty.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFull
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the bar is full.

eventsFunctions.name: PreviousValueDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the previous value conservation duration (in seconds) of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPreviousValueDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the previous value conservation duration (in seconds) of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: IsLabelShown
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the label is shown.

eventsFunctions.name: SetLabelShown
eventsFunctions.description: Show (or hide) the label on the bar.

description:
A bar that represents a resource in the game (health, mana, ammo, etc).

There are ready-to-use resource bars in the asset-store [resource bars pack](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?initial-dialog=asset-store&asset-pack=resource-bars-resource-bars).
